speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got great taste — this 2016 Tahoe LT is one of the nicest full-size SUVs we've had on the lot in months. Leather seats, Bose audio, third-row seating, and that bulletproof 5.3L V8 that'll run forever. Only 142,000 miles and it's been dealer-serviced its whole life. At $24,900, this one's priced to move — I've already had two calls on it this morning!

text: Hey there! You've got great taste — this 2016 Tahoe LT is one of the nicest full-size SUVs we've had on the lot in months. Leather seats, Bose audio, third-row seating, and that bulletproof 5.3L V8 that'll run forever. Only 142,000 miles and it's been dealer-serviced its whole life. speaker: buyer

args.message: Can you tell me if the vehicle has ever been in any accidents? Also, have there been any major repairs done?

text: Can you tell me if the vehicle has ever been in any accidents? Also, have there been any major repairs done?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great questions — I appreciate a careful buyer! This Tahoe has a clean title, no accidents reported on the Carfax. As for major repairs, nothing significant at all. It's had routine maintenance — oil changes, brake pads, the usual stuff you'd expect. Actually, we just had it in our service bay last week for a full inspection and fluid top-off before putting it out on the lot. The techs gave it two thumbs up. This is exactly the kind of well-maintained family hauler that's getting harder and harder to find. Want to take it for a spin? That V8 purrs like a kitten.

speaker: buyer

args.message: I appreciate the info and the offer, but I'm looking to spend around $22,000. Would you be willing to accept that?

text: I appreciate the info and the offer, but I'm looking to spend around $22,000. Would you be willing to accept that?

speaker: seller

args.message: I hear you, and I respect that you know what you want to spend. But I gotta be honest with you — $22,000 is below what I paid for this truck at auction. These Tahoes are flying off lots right now, especially LTs with the leather and Bose package. I actually saw a similar one with MORE miles go for $25,500 at Manheim just last week. Tell you what — I can come down to $24,000 even, and I'll throw in a fresh detail and a full tank of gas. That's about as sharp as I can get on this one. What do you say?

speaker: buyer

args.reason: I appreciate the offer, but $24,000 is still above my budget. Thank you for your time!
